001.title: daemon command uses project_path for save_tasks but scan used brain.plan_tasks
001.failure_reason: Claude rejected: Bug introduced: `project_root = grindbot_dir.parent` is assigned BEFORE the `if grindbot_dir is None` check on the next line, so if `find_grindbot_dir` returns None, it will crash with AttributeError instead of showing the friendly error message. The new line needs to be moved after the None guard.

002.title: Test-fix retry uses stale file_preview instead of current worktree content
002.failure_reason: Syntax error in grindbot/executor.py (line 61): unterminated string literal (detected at line 61)

003.title: Worktree not cleaned up when merge/PR flow fails mid-way
003.failure_reason:
PR merge failed: X Pull request kfwuu/grindbot#15 is not mergeable: the merge commit cannot be cleanly created.
To have the pull request merged after all the requirements have been met, add the `--auto` flag.
Run the following to resolve the merge conflicts locally:
  gh pr checkout 15 && git fetch origin master && git merge origin/master

004.title: API key loaded from ~/.env with no file permission check
004.failure_reason: Claude rejected: Regression: old code stripped surrounding quotes from values (.strip('"').strip("'")), new code does not, so quoted KIE_API_KEY values will break. Also contradicts stated goal: commit claims to stop caching keys into os.environ, but new code now loads ALL other ~/.env variables into os.environ via setdefault, broadening the attack surface rather than narrowing it.

005.title: Add --skip-files flag to exclude files/directories from execution
